system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output: Now I have all 5 confirmed entries. Let me sort alphabetically and compute the SHA-1 hash:

args.command:
python3 -c "
import hashlib

# The 5 confirmed (entity, value) pairs, sorted alphabetically by entity
pairs = [
    ('Northhollow', '1992-04-17'),
    ('Otherwick', '1995-09-22'),
    ('Penrith', '2001-02-08'),
    ('Quenwick', '2014-11-30'),
    ('Riverstone', '2020-06-14'),
]

# Join with | separator
joined = '|'.join(f'{k}={v}' for k, v in pairs)
print('Joined string:', repr(joined))

# Compute SHA-1
sha1 = hashlib.sha1(joined.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
print('SHA-1:', sha1)
"
args.description: Compute SHA-1 of the joined string
